alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions, scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; direct RevOps and Strategy & Operations positioning
alignments.job_requirement: Revenue Operations & Strategy Manager role at SaaS company

alignments.candidate_evidence: L4-equivalent scope at Google with ownership of global commercial operations and transformation program leadership
alignments.job_requirement: Senior-level scope in RevOps / Sales Strategy domain

alignments.candidate_evidence: German citizen with native German language proficiency

gaps.gap: Missing SaaS B2B revenue operations domain experience; Google background is primarily B2C/enterprise devices and services
gaps.mitigation: Core RevOps and transformation leadership skills are transferable; SaaS motions can be learned; EU tech sector context is familiar

gaps.gap: No detailed job description available to assess alignment on specific sales process, expansion strategy, or revenue platform requirements
gaps.mitigation: Request full JD; candidate's transformation and global scaling experience likely covers typical RevOps scope

gaps.gap: Limited consulting or case-team background may reduce familiarity with typical SaaS scaling playbooks if role requires that context
gaps.mitigation: Direct operational experience at scale can substitute for consulting exposure in many RevOps scenarios

output.summary: Strong strategic operations and transformation fit with eight years at Google, two promotions, and global commercial operations ownership. Critical gap is missing full JD to validate specific SaaS B2B revenue operations requirements and scope; candidate's domain is primarily B2C/enterprise devices. German citizenship removes visa friction. Recommend requesting detailed JD before final assessment.
